title: Agentic Project Config
description: Project-local lock/config metadata used by agentic sync/switch flows.

library_commit.description: Git commit hash of the library used to compose the target.

profile.description: Profile identifier or derived profile name.

profile_version.description: Version declared by the source profile.

composed_at.description: UTC timestamp when compose/sync last generated output.

agentic_root.description: Absolute path to the agentic library used by this project.

deploy_mode.description: How runtime assets are materialized in the project.

structure.description: Output structure used by composed instructions.

tiers.description: Declared tiers when structure is nested.
